commit.message:
Playground: prefixItems, build UX, live diagnostics, signature help

- Show prefixItems in type map for non-pure-tuple arrays (ExplicitTupleType/ImplicitTupleType)
- New Project as separate toolbar button; default to first example on load
- Build UX: console progress lines, CSS spinner in status bar, non-blocking Generate/Run
- Live Roslyn diagnostics: 800ms debounced compilation with Monaco markers as user types
- Signature help: Roslyn semantic model method/constructor parameter info via Monaco provider
- Add IDisposable to MainLayout for timer cleanup

commit.message:
Make tuple/array items interactive, show under prefixItems/items headings

- TupleItem: add SchemaPointer and SourceSchemaName for navigation
- Tuple items now clickable: highlights related type, navigates to schema
- Shown under 'prefixItems' heading (matching JSON Schema terminology)
- ArrayItemType: replace flat name strings with TypeMapArrayItemType record
  including SchemaPointer and SourceSchemaName
- Array items shown under 'items' heading as clickable sub-node
- Both highlight related types in the tree when selected

commit.message:
Convert bullet lists to prose in chapter-13

Convert all standalone bullet-point lists outside blockquotes to
integrated prose paragraphs with natural transition phrases, per
editorial guidelines. All clinical facts preserved; numbered lists,
tables, and blockquote callouts left unchanged.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Convert bullet-point lists to prose in chapter-12.md

Convert all standalone bullet-point lists outside blockquotes to
integrated prose paragraphs using natural transition phrases.
Zero bullet lines remain; numbered lists, tables, and blockquote
sidebars are fully preserved.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Convert bullet-point lists to prose in chapter-10.md

Converted all 62 standalone bullet-point lines (lines starting with
'- ' or '  - ') outside blockquotes into integrated prose paragraphs,
targeting the following sections:

- Section 10.2.2: Neutral zone clinical importance (3 bullets)
- Section 10.2.3: Factors toward illness/wellness (11 bullets)
- Section 10.4.2: Primary, secondary, tertiary prevention examples (15 bullets)
- Section 10.4.3: Health promotion across the lifespan (5 bullets)
- Section 10.6.2: Critique of Parsons's sick role (4 bullets)
- Section 10.7.2: Structural racism mechanisms (3 bullets)
- Section 10.7.3: Nursing role at individual, institutional, and
  community/policy levels (12 bullets)
- Chapter Production Notes metadata (9 bullets)

All numbered lists (Learning Objectives, self-management functions,
SDOH domains), tables, and blockquote callout boxes are preserved
unchanged. No clinical facts were added, removed, or altered.

Result: 0 bullet lines remaining (down from 62).

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Convert bullet-point lists to prose paragraphs in chapter-05

Convert all 16 bullet-point blocks throughout chapter 5 into flowing
prose paragraphs, preserving all clinical facts and information:

- Section 5.1.2: cultural humility clinical practices
- Section 5.2.2: health disparities evidence
- Section 5.3.1: health literacy screening tools
- Section 5.3.2: outcomes of low health literacy
- Section 5.3.3: plain language principles
- Section 5.4.1: reasons to use professional interpreters
- Section 5.4.2: nonverbal communication across cultures
- Section 5.5.2: FICA spiritual assessment tool
- Section 5.5.3: spiritual distress nursing response
- Section 5.6.1: LGBTQ+ health disparities
- Section 5.6.2: affirming environment practices (2 blocks)
- Section 5.6.3: transgender clinical implications
- Section 5.7.2: deaf/hard-of-hearing patient practices
- Section 5.8.2: health equity data advocacy
- Section 5.8.4: advocacy entry points

Numbered lists (learning objectives, key takeaways, NCLEX questions),
tables, sidebars, and heading structure remain unchanged.

Bullet count reduced from 71 to 0.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Convert bullet-point lists to prose paragraphs in chapter-04

Convert all standalone bullet-point lists throughout chapter 4 to
flowing prose paragraphs:

- SURETY active-listening model (6 bullets → single integrated paragraph)
- SBAR framework components (4 bullets → prose with bold component labels)
- I-PASS handoff tool components (5 bullets → prose with bold labels)
- FACT documentation acronym (4 bullets → prose with bold labels)
- NCLEX-style answer choices (A/B/C/D/E) reformatted from '- A.' bullet
  syntax to '**A.**' labeled items, preserving test-question readability
  without using Markdown bullet syntax

All clinical information, heading structure, tables, numbered learning
objectives, sidebars, and blockquote callout boxes are preserved unchanged.
Bullet count reduced from 82 to 0.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Convert bullet-point lists to prose paragraphs in chapter-03

Convert all 12 standalone bullet-point sections in chapter-03.md into
flowing prose paragraphs, preserving all clinical facts and information.

Converted sections:
- Section 3.1.2: Key legal sources (PSDA, HIPAA, Joint Commission, state law)
- Section 3.1.3: Fundamental patient rights
- Section 3.2.3: Strategies to overcome advocacy barriers
- Section 3.3.2: Nurse's responsibilities in the consent process
- Section 3.3.3: Special forms of consent (emergency, research, photography, transfusion)
- Section 3.3.4: Required documentation content
- Section 3.4.3: Surrogate decision-making standards
- Section 3.5.1: Types of advance directives
- Section 3.5.2: Nurse's role in advance care planning
- Section 3.6.2: HIPAA Privacy Rule provisions
- Section 3.6.3: Exceptions to confidentiality
- Section 3.7.1: Minor consent exceptions

Kept as-is: Learning Objectives (numbered list), Key Terms table,
Answer Key table, NCLEX questions with answer choices, callout boxes
(blockquotes), and the informed consent elements numbered list.

Result: 0 bullet lines remaining (down from 40+).

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Convert bullet lists to prose in chapter 14

Convert 80 bullet-point lines across 16 sections of Chapter 14
(Fluid, Electrolyte, and Acid-Base Balance) into flowing prose
paragraphs to improve readability for nursing students.

Sections converted:
- Fluid compartment descriptions (ICF/ECF)
- Regulatory mechanism list (ADH, RAAS, ANP, thirst)
- Osmolarity/osmolality/osmol gap/tonicity definitions
- Fluid volume excess signs and symptoms
- Hyponatremia tonicity classification
- Hypokalemia causes, manifestations, nursing management
- Hyperkalemia causes, manifestations, nursing management
- Respiratory acidosis cause/compensation/manifestations/management
- Respiratory alkalosis cause/compensation/manifestations/management
- Metabolic acidosis anion gap/compensation/manifestations/management
- Metabolic alkalosis cause/classification/compensation/manifestations/management
- ROME method description
- Worked ABG example step-by-step
- Physical examination bullets (assessment section)
- Laboratory monitoring bullets (assessment section)
- Key nursing interventions bullets
- Case study laboratory results

Remaining bullets (5): Production Notes metadata only.
All clinical facts preserved; no content added or removed.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Improve prose readability per code review feedback

Address three readability issues identified in review:
- BON paragraph: split into two logical sentences by function
  (educational/credentialing vs. enforcement/regulatory)
- Licensure levels paragraph: break RN sentence at semicolon into
  two distinct sentences for easier parsing
- Malpractice categories paragraph: restructure to reduce dense
  em-dashed nesting; move category names to sentence subjects

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Fix API redirect, playground opens in new tab, add playground CTA, fix theme reload

- API index: use relative redirect (v5/index.html) instead of absolute path
  that was missing the /Corvus.Text.Json/ prefix
- Header: playground link opens in new tab with target=_blank
- Home page: add 'Try the Playground' CTA in hero and bottom sections
- Theme: anti-flash script stores resolved theme in window.__playgroundResolvedTheme
- Theme: InitializeThemeAsync immediately syncs with anti-flash result
- Theme: applyTheme retries Monaco setTheme if editor hasn't loaded yet

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Add dark/light mode theming and console clear button

- Extract all ~60 hardcoded colors in app.css to CSS custom properties
- Add complete light theme via [data-theme='light'] and prefers-color-scheme media query
- Add theme toggle button in toolbar (cycles Auto → Light → Dark)
- Persist theme preference in localStorage, auto-detect system preference
- Monaco editors switch between 'vs-dark' and 'vs' themes
- Anti-flash inline script in index.html applies theme before first paint
- System theme change listener updates playground when OS preference changes
- Add console clear button (🗑️) to console toolbar

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

- Playground base href now uses prefix: /Corvus.Text.Json/playground/
- Workflow passes -BasePathPrefix '/Corvus.Text.Json' to build.ps1
- Local dev (no prefix) still works unchanged

commit.message:
Fix build.ps1: create destination dirs before copying source files

The content/Docs and content/Examples directories are generated and not
tracked in git. In a fresh CI checkout they don't exist, causing the
Copy-Item at Step 0 to fail.

commit.message:
feat(api): enforce squad number immutability on PUT (#529)

Add a mismatch guard in put_async: if squad_number in the request
body does not match the path parameter, return HTTP 400 Bad Request.
The path parameter is the authoritative source of identity on PUT.

Document the single-model design decision in PlayerRequestModel:
one model intentionally covers both POST and PUT, with per-operation
differences handled at the route layer.

commit.message:
feat: add download-index command for pre-built index from GitHub Releases

Users can now get semantic search in ~30 seconds instead of 15-30 minutes:
  npx @jasonbellz/gospel-library-mcp download-index

Downloads index.db from the latest GitHub Release and saves it to
~/.gospel-library-mcp/index.db. Uses atomic write (.tmp + rename)
to avoid corruption if interrupted.

Also:
- Export DB_DIR from vectorStore.ts (needed by downloader)
- Update startup/search fallback messages to suggest download-index first
- Update build-index message to reflect title+description indexing

commit.message:
Add contextual Tips & Tricks section for remaining daily protein goal (#7)

Users had no in-app guidance on how to close the gap between their
current intake and daily protein goal. This adds a dynamic tips section
that surfaces food suggestions calibrated to the remaining amount.

### Changes

- **`index.html`** — New `#tips-section` container placed below Today's
Log; hidden by default via `display:none`
- **`app.js`**
  - `getTips(remaining)` — returns 3 contextual tips across 4 tiers:
    | Remaining | Suggestions |
    |-----------|-------------|
    | ≥ 60g | Chicken breast 200g, tuna + shake combo, meal planning |
    | 30–59g | Whey shake, tuna 100g, Greek yogurt + cottage cheese |
    | 10–29g | Greek yogurt 150g, two eggs, cottage cheese 100g |
    | < 10g | Milk 200ml, one egg, cottage cheese 50g |
- `renderTips()` — shows/hides section based on remaining; hidden once
goal is met
- `render()` now calls `renderTips()` so tips update live on every entry
change
- **`style.css`** — `.tip-item` uses a green left-border accent
(`border-left: 3px solid var(--green-500)`) and reuses existing
surface/text-muted variables; consistent with the log item design

<!-- START COPILOT CODING AGENT SUFFIX -->



<!-- START COPILOT ORIGINAL PROMPT -->



<details>

<summary>Original prompt</summary>

> erstelle einen Bereich mit Tipps und Tricks zur Erreichung des
verbliebenen Rest


</details>



<!-- START COPILOT CODING AGENT TIPS -->
---

⚡ Quickly spin up Copilot coding agent tasks from anywhere on your macOS
or Windows machine with [Raycast](https://gh.io/cca-raycast-docs).

feat: index title + og:description for richer semantic embeddings

Previously only the article title was embedded. Now each document is
indexed as 'Title. Description' using the og:description meta tag,
which contains a meaningful summary of the article content.

This significantly improves semantic search recall — queries about
concepts mentioned only in the article body (not the title) now match
correctly. Existing indexes should be rebuilt with build-index.

Also includes entity decoding for meta tag content (& etc.) and
expanded Range header from 8KB to 16KB to capture longer <head> sections.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* feat(deploy): 3-step save verification, celebratory UX, and focus management

Replace the simple "Configuration saved" message with a progressive
3-step verification sequence after save:
  1. Configuration saved ✅ (re-read project to confirm)
  2. Trigger active ✅ / ⚠️ inconclusive (check deployments API)
  3. Script accessible ✅ (verify project metadata)

Add celebratory confirmation UX with variant text:
  - Fresh deploy: "🎉 Your automation is live!"
  - Edit/re-save: "🎉 Your automation is updated and running."

Add focus management (WCAG 2.1 AA):
  - Focus moves to save-status after save completes
  - Focus moves to error message on config load failure
  - Focus moves to first form element after panel load

Fix parseGmailConfig/parseCalendarConfig returning null for empty
configs by skipping non-config brace blocks (function body braces).

5 new Playwright tests covering verification sequence, celebratory
text variants, trigger degradation, focus management, and edit-mode
detection.

titles) had duplicate entries in localStorage, causing Step 4 to render
multiple panels per script — some pointing at stale/deleted project IDs
that returned 404 errors.

getDeployedProjects() now deduplicates by catalogId, keeping only the
last entry per script. Adds a Playwright test confirming 3 localStorage
entries for 2 distinct scripts produce exactly 2 config panels.

commit.message:
feat: add workflow resolver and workflow cli option

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat: add interactive playground (Blazor WASM) - Phase 1 scaffold

Blazor WebAssembly project with:
- Monaco editors for JSON Schema and C# user code
- V5 code generation engine (WASM-safe via PrepopulatedDocumentResolver)
- Embedded metaschemas loaded from assembly resources (no file I/O)
- Type map panel showing generated types linked to schema locations
- Default code emitter for auto-populating user code
- URL state service for shareable playground links
- Sample 'Person' schema with address

Phase 2 (Roslyn compilation + execution) is stubbed out.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

test: add failing workflow mode contract checks

docs: add workflow default and naming migration plan

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

docs: define workflow naming and default strategy

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix: pass canonical repo URL to XmlDocToMarkdown tool

Add $canonicalRepoUrl variable and pass --repo-url to both V5 and V4
invocations so source links always point to corvus-dotnet/Corvus.Text.Json
regardless of which fork is checked out locally.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
docs: rewrite README with full configuration reference

- Remove duplicate content
- Document all 4 tools with full parameter tables
- Document category aliases for search_gospel_library
- Full scripture abbreviation reference (all 4 standard works)
- build-index and refresh commands with expected run times
- Files created on system (~/.gospel-library-mcp/index.db etc.)
- Copilot instructions setup for proactive use
- Publishing workflow

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

repository.name: gospel-library-mcp
repository.description: A MCP server for Gospel Library

commit.message:
fix: improve step5/step6 heading and image handling

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Initial commit: Gospel Library MCP v2.0.0

- 4 MCP tools: search_gospel_library, get_article, browse_category, get_scripture
- Semantic vector search via @xenova/transformers (all-MiniLM-L6-v2, runs locally)
- Local SQLite vector store (~/.gospel-library-mcp/index.db)
- CLI commands: build-index, refresh
- Sitemap slug search fallback when index not built
- No API key required

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
fix: correct GitHub URL from Corvus.JsonSchema to Corvus.Text.Json

The _Layout.cshtml default GitHubUrl still referenced the old
Corvus.JsonSchema repository name, breaking the 'Collaborate with us'
and 'Open an issue' links on API reference pages.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
refactor: separate hand-authored files from generated content

Move hand-authored source files (Overview.md, taxonomy index.yml) to
site/source/ directory. Build step 0 copies them into the target tree
before generation steps run. Generated docs/examples/taxonomy content
is now fully gitignored without fragile exception rules.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
